abilities.name: Burning Man's Gift
abilities.text: Once per activation. After an ally within 8" with a Burning token declares an action, it may add a suit to its duel total. If it does so, it resolves its Burning token after resolving the action.

abilities.name: Flame is Promised to Me
abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage, this model may remove a Burning token from a model within 2" to reduce the damage by 2.

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

actions.name: Hand of Immolation
actions.costs_and_restrictions: While this model has a Burning token, this attack has a raise value of 3.
actions.effects: Models damaged by this action gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Accelerant
triggers.text: Once per activation. Resolve the effect of the target's Burning token.

triggers.name: Rampage
triggers.text: Move this model 5", ignoring enemy models. Models moved through this way must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be dealt 1 damage.

actions.name: Leap of Burning Faith
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target an ally with a Burning token.
actions.effects: Place the target anywhere within 8" of its current location.

triggers.name: Explosive Entrance
triggers.text: Enemy models within (aura)2" of the target must pass a TN 11 Df duel or be dealt 2 damage.

actions.name: Phoenix's Touch
actions.effects: Target heals 2 and may gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Heat Transfer
triggers.text: Models within (aura)2" of the target gain a Burning token.

actions.name: Wings of Fire
actions.effects: Move this model up to 6" in a straight line. Models moved through this way gain a Burning token.
